name: @octave-commons/bitch-tracker
description: Shadow-CLJS BetterDiscord plugin and Discord bot for OpenPlanner moderation/event tracking.

scripts.build:cljs: pnpm run build:plugin:cljs && pnpm run build:bot:cljs
scripts.build: pnpm run build:cljs && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run verify
scripts.test: pnpm run lint:clj && pnpm run test:cljs && pnpm run build
